Best Spain Tour Packages from India – Explore the Vibrant Culture and Scenic Beauty

When fiery sunsets paint the Alhambra’s walls gold and the scent of orange blossoms drifts through winding alleyways, Spain reveals its soul in color, rhythm, and flavor. With Travelxploria as your Best Travel Agency, innovative Best Tour Operator, and globally connected Best International Tour Operator, every fiesta of discovery is seamlessly orchestrated. Choose our Best Package of Spain, share the joy of the Best Family package, or let passion bloom under the guidance of our Best Honeymoon Planner.

Why Choose Spain for Your Next International Trip from India?

Rich History, Art, and Architecture
Madrid’s grand boulevards pulse with life as early risers sip café con leche beneath wrought-iron balconies. Travelxploria arranges a private stroll through the Retiro’s rose gardens, unveiling hidden sculptures before the city awakens. In the Prado’s hushed halls, our Best Tour Operator status grants you behind-the-scenes insights into Velázquez’s masterpieces. For verified details and ticketing, travelers are encouraged to visit the official Prado Museum website and Spain’s tourism board for up-to-date information.
Travelers looking for other rich cultural journeys may also explore our India to Europe Tour package or consider historic routes with an India to Italy Tour package.

Stunning Beaches, Mountains, and Cities
Barcelona unfolds like a mosaic of Gaudí’s dreams—whimsical chimneys, kaleidoscopic tiling, and soaring spires kissed by Mediterranean breezes. With the Best Package of Spain, Travelxploria secures a twilight visit to Park Güell, when lampposts flicker on and the city glitters below. Lantern-lit tapas bars await, where patatas bravas sparkle with smoky paprika and local vermouth flows freely. To fully enjoy Barcelona’s public transport and cultural events, visitors should consider local metro passes and check festival schedules on the city’s official tourism portal.
Those interested in further beach and city escapes may check out our India to Thailand Tour Package or the India to Maldives Tour package.

Perfect for Culture Lovers, Food Enthusiasts, and Families
Further south, Seville’s orange-tree courtyards echo with castanet clicks and flamenco guitar. Under our Best Family package, families explore the Alcázar’s lush courtyards by horse-drawn carriage, while little ones chase fountains beneath Moorish arches. For couples, the Best Honeymoon Planner arranges a private tablao performance—flames dancing in the singer’s eyes as heels stamp the tiled stage. Travelers are advised to book such exclusive experiences well in advance to ensure availability, especially during peak seasons.
For travelers interested in solo experiences or adventure, explore our solo travel packages or adventure tour packages for more ideas.

Top Spain Tour Packages from India

7 to 10 Days Spain Tour Package from India – Madrid, Barcelona & Andalusia
Granada’s Alhambra rises above the city like a fairy-tale fortress. Travelxploria’s Best International Tour Operator connections grant you exclusive access to the Nasrid Palaces at dawn—when sunbeams slice through ornate latticework and gardens resonate with birdsong. Visitors should note that tickets for the Alhambra sell out quickly; early booking is highly recommended through official channels.
Combine your Spain tour with an India to France Tour package or explore the breathtaking views in our India to Switzerland Tour package for an extended European adventure.

Spain Honeymoon Packages from India
On Valencia’s sun-drenched shores, paella pans sizzle with saffron-kissed rice and seafood treasures. As part of our Best Package of Spain, you’ll learn the art of rice-stirring in a family-run finca, then dine al fresco beneath palms swaying in the coastal breeze. Including such authentic culinary experiences enhances the honeymoon journey with genuine local flavor.
Couples can also explore our popular honeymoon packages for destinations like Japan or Vietnam.

Budget-Friendly Spain Tour Packages for Indian Travelers
In the Basque Country, Bilbao’s Guggenheim gleams like a ship of titanium petals. Travelxploria arranges private curator-led tours, followed by pintxos hopping through hidden bars—each morsel a burst of anchovy, olive, or Idiazábal cheese. For travelers seeking affordable Spain cultural tour packages from India on a budget, Bilbao offers a wealth of free or low-cost museums and public spaces to explore.
Expand your budget travel options with our India to Vietnam Tour Package or discover the natural wonders on our iceland tour packages from india.

Customized Spain Itineraries for Families and Groups
Island idylls await in Mallorca, where hidden coves sparkle turquoise and rose-strewn fincas overlook rolling olive groves. With our Best Family package, little ones snorkel beside playful octopuses, while parents toast the sunset with local Mallorcan wines, handpicked by our Best Honeymoon Planner. Families and groups can tailor their itineraries to include a balance of relaxation and adventure, supported by Travelxploria’s expert concierge services.

Must-Visit Destinations Covered in Spain Tour Packages

Madrid – Royal Palaces, Museums & Nightlife
Madrid is a vibrant city with rich history and nightlife. Travelers should be mindful of local customs and peak hours for tourist sites, planning visits early or late to avoid crowds.

Barcelona – Gaudí’s Masterpieces and Beaches
Barcelona’s unique architecture and beaches offer endless exploration. Visitors are encouraged to book guided tours through official sources to get the most authentic experience.

Seville – Flamenco, Historic Squares & Cathedrals
Seville is famous for its flamenco and historic ambiance. Booking shows and tours in advance through trusted providers ensures availability.

Granada – The Alhambra and Moorish Architecture
Granada’s Alhambra is a UNESCO World Heritage site. Planning and early ticket purchases are essential due to high demand.

Valencia – Festivals, Beaches, and Paella
Valencia is a hub for festivals like Las Fallas. Checking official festival dates can help travelers enjoy local celebrations fully.

What’s Included in the Best Spain Tour Packages from India?

Round-Trip Flights and Airport Transfers
Flights booked through trusted airlines ensure reliability. Airport transfers are included for a seamless travel experience.

Comfortable Accommodation with Daily Breakfast
Accommodations are carefully selected based on guest reviews and ratings to guarantee comfort and service.

Local Transportation and Guided Sightseeing Tours
Local transport options include private transfers, metros, and buses; guided tours offer in-depth cultural insights.

Optional Excursions and Cultural Experiences
Travelers can opt for additional excursions like flamenco nights, vineyard tours, or cooking classes for a richer experience.

Best Time to Visit Spain from India
Spring (March to May) – Festivals and Pleasant Weather
Spring is ideal with mild weather and vibrant festivals. Packing layers is advisable for variable temperatures.

Summer (June to August) – Beaches and Outdoor Events
Summer brings lively beach scenes but can be hot; sun protection and hydration are essential.

Autumn (September to November) – Mild Weather and Harvest Festivals
Autumn offers pleasant weather and food festivals celebrating the harvest. Booking early for popular events is recommended.

Frequently Asked Questions About Spain Tour Packages from India

What are the visa requirements for Indian travelers to Spain?
Indian travelers need a Schengen visa; applying well ahead of travel and submitting all required documents minimizes delays.

How long should a Spain tour last?
A 7 to 10-day tour allows for major highlights; customized itineraries can extend or shorten visits based on preference.

Can Spain tours be combined with other European countries?
Yes, combining Spain with nearby countries like France or Portugal is popular. Multi-country packages can be arranged through Travelxploria.

How to Book the Best Spain Tour Packages from India

Trusted Travel Agencies and Online Booking Platforms
Booking through verified agencies like Travelxploria ensures secure transactions and quality service.

Tips to Find the Best Deals and Offers
Early booking, flexible travel dates, and package deals often yield better prices. Signing up for newsletters can alert travelers to discounts.

Important Travel Documents and Packing Tips
Travelers should carry valid passports, visas, and health insurance. Packing comfortable shoes, weather-appropriate clothing, and adaptors is recommended.

With your entrance ticket, step into a world of rejuvenation as you explore the beautifully designed neo-baroque architecture and soak in the mineral-rich thermal waters sourced from natural hot springs. Discover the elegance and imperial grandeur of Austria’s capital on a comprehensive Vienna city tour that includes entrance to the majestic Schönbrunn Palace. Begin by exploring Vienna’s most iconic landmarks such as the Ringstrasse, Hofburg Palace, St. Stephen’s Cathedral, and the Vienna State Opera, while learning about the city’s rich Habsburg history and cultural legacy. The highlight of the tour is a guided visit to Schönbrunn Palace, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, where you’ll walk through opulent state rooms and beautifully maintained gardens. This immersive experience offers a perfect blend of history, architecture, and royal charm, showcasing Vienna’s timeless allure.

Take this opportunity to explore at your own pace—perhaps stroll through the charming streets of the Old Town, relax at a traditional Viennese café with a slice of Sachertorte, or visit one of the city’s many renowned museums or galleries. packages.package_name: European Capitals & Cultural Marvels: From Spain to England
packages.overview:
• Spain – A Tapestry of Culture & Heritage
  • Madrid – Explore the Royal Palace, Prado Museum, and Plaza Mayor, experiencing Spain's capital at its finest.
  • Barcelona – Admire Gaudí’s masterpieces like Sagrada Familia and Park Güell, and stroll along La Rambla.
  • Seville – Visit the Alcázar Palace, Seville Cathedral, and experience authentic Flamenco.
  • Valencia – Discover the City of Arts and Sciences and relax on stunning Mediterranean beaches.
  • France – A Stop in Timeless Beauty
  • Paris – Wander through the Champs-Élysées, Eiffel Tower, and Louvre Museum, soaking in French romance.
  • Normandy & Rouen – Walk through history at Mont Saint-Michel, the D-Day beaches, and Rouen Cathedral.
  • England – A Blend of Royalty & Tradition
  • London – Visit the Tower of London, Buckingham Palace, Big Ben, and the British Museum.
    🇬🇧 Durham & Edinburgh – Experience the medieval charm of Durham Cathedral and Scotland’s capital, with its Edinburgh Castle and Royal Mile.
  • Liverpool & Manchester – Discover the home of The Beatles and explore England’s rich industrial heritage.

packages.package_name: Grand European Odyssey: Castles, Coasts & Culture
packages.overview:
Spain: The Land of Passion & Heritage

1. Madrid – The Spanish Capital of Art & Culture

  • Explore the world-famous Prado Museum, home to masterpieces by Goya and Velázquez.

  • Visit the majestic Royal Palace of Madrid, the largest royal palace in Europe.

  • Stroll through Plaza Mayor and enjoy traditional Spanish tapas.

  • Admire the lively atmosphere at Puerta del Sol, Madrid’s bustling square.

2. Barcelona – Gaudí’s Masterpiece

  • Marvel at the Sagrada Familia, Antoni Gaudí’s architectural wonder.

  • Wander through Park Güell, a colorful, surreal park full of artistic mosaics.

  • Walk along the famous La Rambla, lined with street performers and markets.

  • Visit the Gothic Quarter, filled with medieval history and charming cafes.

3. Seville – The Heart of Andalusia

  • Watch an authentic Flamenco performance in the historic Triana district.

  • Visit the stunning Alcázar of Seville, a blend of Moorish and Spanish architecture.

  • Walk through Plaza de España, an iconic landmark with stunning bridges and canals.

  • Explore the Seville Cathedral and climb the Giralda Tower for panoramic views.

Austria: The Land of Imperial Majesty & Music

4. Vienna – The City of Music & Royalty

  • Visit the opulent Schönbrunn Palace, the summer residence of the Habsburgs.

  • Experience classical music at the Vienna State Opera.

  • Explore the Hofburg Palace, once the center of the Austrian Empire.

  • Stroll through St. Stephen’s Cathedral and the historic city center.

5. Salzburg – Mozart’s Birthplace & Alpine Beauty

  • Discover the stunning Hohensalzburg Fortress, overlooking the city.

  • Visit Mirabell Palace & Gardens, featured in The Sound of Music.

  • Explore Mozart’s Birthplace, a must-visit for music lovers.

  • Enjoy breathtaking views of the Austrian Alps.

We’ll journey to Switzerland, arriving in Geneva. With our guide, we’ll go to Palais des Nations (headquarters of the United Nations in Europe), and we’ll see the beautiful English Garden with its flower clock, and admire the Jet d’Eau, the tallest fountain in Europe. Our next stop will be the charming, walled village of Gruyères, world-renowned for its cheese. Nearby, there are some of Switzerland´s major chocolate factories, including Nestlé. Our tour includes admission to the Maison Cailler Chocolate Factory, where you’ll enjoy a sweet tasting experience.

We’ll continue our journey along scenic roads, passing through bucolic mountain landscapes and picturesque wooden villages, until we reach Chillon Castle, built on the shores of Lake Geneva (admission included). We’ll arrive in Leysin by mid-afternoon, a charming holiday village with spectacular views of the Rhône Valley and Mont Blanc. Leysin is well-known for its winter sports resort and hiking options. Dinner will be included.

In the morning, we’ll enjoy a panoramic tour of Italy’s capital, the Eternal City, one of the oldest and most influential cities in Western civilization. We’ll combine a walking tour with a panoramic bus ride. During the walking tour, we´ll admire the Arch of Constantine, the Colosseum (from the outside), and the impressive Imperial Forums. After that, we’ll continue by bus, exploring this open-air-museum city with majestic basilicas and churches, passing by Tiber Island, Lungotevere Avenue, and Castel Sant´Angelo. The tour will finish at Vatican City, an independent state within Rome and the center of the Catholic Church. The afternoon will be free. We recommend visiting St. Peter’s Basilica and the Vatican Museums.


In the evening, we’ll provide a transfer to Trastevere, perfect for a leisurely stroll through its charming, narrow cobblestone streets. This district is rich in hidden gems, from quaint medieval churches and quirky shops selling unique items to everyday scenes of local life. You’ll find many trattorias (casual eating establishments, typically less formal than a ristorante) and osterias (similar to taverns), each exuding Italian charm and ready to serve you authentic local dishes. Additionally, the area offers a variety of restaurants serving Indian, Chinese, and international cuisine. We’ll return to the hotel at the end of the evening.

packages.package_name: The Wonders of Spain and Portugal
packages.overview:
Spain

  • Cultural Heritage: World-class museums (Prado in Madrid), iconic architecture (Gaudí’s Park Güell in Barcelona).

  • Historic Cities: Seville (Flamenco, Alcázar Palace), Granada (Alhambra Palace), Toledo (medieval charm).

  • Coastlines: Costa Brava, Balearic Islands, and Canary Islands offer stunning beaches and water activities.

  • Cuisine: Famous dishes like paella, tapas, and jamón ibérico; vibrant food culture.

  • Festivals: La Tomatina, San Fermin (Running of the Bulls), and Semana Santa (Holy Week).

Portugal

  • Charming Cities: Lisbon (Alfama, Baixa), Porto (wine cellars, riverside charm).

  • Historical Landmarks: Belém Tower, Jerónimos Monastery in Lisbon, Pena Palace in Sintra.

  • Coastline: Algarve (cliffs, golden beaches), Azores and Madeira (lush landscapes, natural beauty).

  • Cuisine & Wine: Known for Port wine, bacalhau (salted cod), and pastéis de nata (custard tarts).

  • Cultural Experiences: Fado music, rich maritime history, Age of Discovery significance.

[{"city":"Granada","country":"Spain","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Spain/Granada/1744968952827-AdobeStock_95394957-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival at Madrid & Proceed Towards Granada","day_summary":"

Welcome to your tour. We will depart from Madrid early in the morning, heading south through La Mancha. Our first stop will be in Puerto Lápice, a charming Manchego village evocative of Don Quixote. We will then continue into Andalusia via Despeñaperros, arriving in Granada, where lunch will be included. In the afternoon, if you have chosen the option that includes a visit to the Alhambra, we will explore the magnificent Alhambra Palace and its beautiful Generalife Gardens, both built during the Arab period, with a local guide.

Today, we´ll experience the stunning landscapes of northern Portugal. We´ll begin with a stroll through Braga, known as the religious capital of Portugal, with its historic cathedral. Next, we´ll ascend to the Sanctuary of Bom Jesus on the world´s oldest cable car, enjoying beautiful views. Afterward, we recommend you descend via the impressive staircase. Guimarães, Portugal´s first capital, awaits with its magnificent Palace of the Dukes. After lunch amidst picturesque vineyards, we´ll descend into the Douro Valley, passing by Sabrosa, the birthplace of Magellan. In Pinhão, we´ll explore its charming train station adorned with traditional tiles and enjoy a one-hour cruise along the Douro River, showcasing the region´s beauty (from November to March, the cruise is not available, so it will be replaced with a scenic drive with stops at viewpoints along the Douro River). Finally, we´ll continue to Coimbra, arriving at the end of the day. Dinner will be included.

packages.package_name: Exploring the Heart of Spain and Portugal
packages.overview:
Embark on a spectacular 15-day journey through the heart of Portugal and Spain, expertly curated by Travelxploria. Begin in the vibrant city of Lisbon, where you’ll be greeted with a warm welcome and transferred to your hotel. Uncover the historic charm of Jerónimos Monastery and the cobbled streets of Alfama before heading to the sunny shores of Albufeira. Travel inland to the Roman-rich town of Évora, and make your way to the sacred site of Fátima, a significant pilgrimage destination.

Your journey continues as you head to Porto, where a scenic half-day tour along the Douro River awaits. Cross into Spain and indulge in a delightful winery tour in Santiago de Compostela. Immerse yourself in the medieval charm of Oviedo, before relaxing in the coastal beauty of Santander. Then, explore the Basque Country, with stops in the dynamic cities of Bilbao or San Sebastián, each known for their artistic flair and unique charm.

In Barcelona, marvel at Gaudí’s masterpieces and stroll through the historic Gothic Quarter, followed by a grand finale in Madrid, where the Royal Palace, Prado Museum, and Retiro Park await your discovery. With Travelxploria, your adventure through these two incredible countries will leave you with unforgettable memories, enriching your spirit and broadening your horizons. After an incredible journey, your comfortable transfer will bring you to the airport, where you’ll depart with a heart full of cherished experiences.

Upon arrival in the Algarve, the southern region of Portugal, we´ll explore the historic city of Lagos, known for its port from where Portuguese ships once sailed to Brazil, and its charming historic center enclosed within ancient walls. There will be time for lunch. In the afternoon, we´ll travel to the westernmost point of continental Europe amidst windswept cliffs to discover Cape St. Vincent. packages.package_name: Legendary Tour of Morocco, Spain & Portugal
packages.overview:
• Morocco: A land of contrasts, where the bustling souks and ancient medinas of cities like Marrakech and Fes meet the vastness of the Sahara Desert. Explore vibrant markets, historic palaces, and the stunning Atlas Mountains. Morocco is famous for its unique blend of Arab, Berber, and French influences.

  • Spain: Known for its lively culture, stunning architecture, and delicious cuisine, Spain offers everything from the artistic wonders of Barcelona and Madrid to the flamenco rhythms of Seville. Don't miss the beautiful beaches of Costa Brava and the historic allure of Andalusia.

  • Portugal: A country of stunning coastline, charming cities, and rich maritime history. Lisbon offers a mix of traditional and contemporary culture, while Porto is famous for its wine and scenic riverfront. The Algarve region boasts picturesque beaches, and the beautiful landscapes of Madeira and the Azores are perfect for nature lovers.

This morning, we’ll start with an included guided tour of Morocco’s largest city and economic center. We’ll stroll along the grand avenues, visit the beautiful Mohamed V Square with its fountain, Moorish buildings, and palm trees, and walk through the Arab League Park. We’ll also explore the little Medina. Our tour includes admission to the impressive Hassan II Mosque (the only mosque in Morocco open to non-Muslims), located by the sea and featuring a 210-meter-high minaret with laser lights pointing to Mecca. After the tour, you’ll have free time for lunch in the pleasant maritime area of La Corniche. After lunch, we’ll travel to El Jadida. Its citadel (Mazagan) is a UNESCO World Heritage Site, built by the Portuguese in the early sixteenth century. We’ll stroll through its picturesque streets, which retain many traces of the Portuguese era, such as the Manueline-style Church of the Assumption. We’ll also include a visit to the old sixteenth-century cistern. After exploring, our journey will continue to Safi, arriving in the late afternoon. Dinner will be included.

With our guide, we’ll visit Safi, a city renowned for its ceramics, highly prized throughout Morocco for their quality and bright colors. We’ll photograph the Castle of the Sea and its impressive fortress walls, stroll through the charming Medina, and visit the Hill of the Potters with its many shops.


Afterward, we’ll continue to Essaouira. Its walled Medina, facing the sea, is a UNESCO World Heritage Site. This beautifully preserved city is a favorite among artists and painters. You’ll have free time for lunch and to wander through its narrow streets, whitewashed houses, and strong walls struck by the waves.


After lunch, we’ll continue along the Atlantic coast, taking in the magnificent landscapes. We’ll make a brief stop in Taghazout, a picturesque small town known for its fishing and popular with surfers. Then, we’ll proceed to Agadir for accommodation, arriving in the evening. Dinner will be included.

packages.overview:
• Hassan II Mosque – A majestic architectural masterpiece by the sea, boasting the world’s tallest minaret with laser beams pointing to Mecca.
  • El Jadida’s Citadel (Mazagan) – A UNESCO-listed Portuguese fortress with charming streets, ancient walls, and a Manueline-style church.
  • Essaouira Medina – A stunning coastal fortress with whitewashed houses, artistic alleys, and dramatic ocean waves crashing against its walls.
  • Jemaa el-Fnaa Square – The heart of Marrakech, alive with storytellers, snake charmers, vibrant souks, and mouthwatering street food.
  • Ouzoud Falls – Northern Africa’s tallest waterfalls, where you’ll enjoy a boat ride, scenic vistas, and playful wild macaques.
  • Fez Medina – Morocco’s cultural soul, an intricate labyrinth of souks, tanneries, and palaces transporting you to a bygone era.
  • Tangier – A captivating city where Africa and Europe meet, with bustling souks and panoramic views over the Strait of Gibraltar.
  • Seville Cathedral & Giralda – A towering Gothic wonder with breathtaking city views from its iconic bell tower.
  • Córdoba Mosque-Cathedral – A mesmerizing blend of Islamic and Christian artistry, with grand arches and intricate Moorish designs.
  • Consuegra Windmills – Legendary La Mancha landscapes featuring Don Quixote’s iconic windmills, standing tall against the Spanish plains.

This morning, we’ll start with an included guided tour of Morocco’s largest city and economic center. We’ll stroll along the grand avenues, visit the beautiful Mohamed V Square with its fountain, Moorish buildings, and palm trees, and walk through the Arab League Park. We’ll also explore the little Medina. Our tour includes admission to the impressive Hassan II Mosque (the only mosque in Morocco open to non-Muslims), located by the sea and featuring a 210-meter-high minaret with laser lights pointing to Mecca. After the tour, you’ll have free time for lunch in the pleasant maritime area of La Corniche. After lunch, we’ll travel to El Jadida. Its citadel (Mazagan) is a UNESCO World Heritage Site, built by the Portuguese in the early sixteenth century. We’ll stroll through its picturesque streets, which retain many traces of the Portuguese era, such as the Manueline-style Church of the Assumption. We’ll also include a visit to the old sixteenth-century cistern. After exploring, our journey will continue to Safi, arriving in the late afternoon. Dinner will be included.

With our guide, we’ll visit Safi, a city renowned for its ceramics, highly prized throughout Morocco for their quality and bright colors. We’ll photograph the Castle of the Sea and its impressive fortress walls, stroll through the charming Medina, and visit the Hill of the Potters with its many shops.


Afterward, we’ll continue to Essaouira. Its walled Medina, facing the sea, is a UNESCO World Heritage Site. This beautifully preserved city is a favorite among artists and painters. You’ll have free time for lunch and to wander through its narrow streets, whitewashed houses, and strong walls struck by the waves.


After lunch, we’ll continue along the Atlantic coast, taking in the magnificent landscapes. We’ll make a brief stop in Taghazout, a picturesque small town known for its fishing and popular with surfers. Then, we’ll proceed to Agadir for accommodation, arriving in the evening. Dinner will be included.

{"title":"SUTAPAR EATERY","rating":"5","publishDate":"2024-12-17","publishBy":"","subItems":[{"type":"text","content":"

We recently had the pleasure of travelling to Singapore with the expert guidance of Travelxploria and it was an absolutely delight! from planning to execution, their team took care of every detail, ensuring a seamless and unforgettable experience for my family and me. Their meticulous attention to detail, from communication and personalised service made all the difference. overview:
Best Spain Tour Packages from India – Explore the Vibrant Culture and Scenic Beauty

When fiery sunsets paint the Alhambra’s walls gold and the scent of orange blossoms drifts through winding alleyways, Spain reveals its soul in color, rhythm, and flavor. With Travelxploria as your Best Travel Agency, innovative Best Tour Operator, and globally connected Best International Tour Operator, every fiesta of discovery is seamlessly orchestrated. Choose our Best Package of Spain, share the joy of the Best Family package, or let passion bloom under the guidance of our Best Honeymoon Planner.

Why Choose Spain for Your Next International Trip from India?

Rich History, Art, and Architecture
Madrid’s grand boulevards pulse with life as early risers sip café con leche beneath wrought-iron balconies. Travelxploria arranges a private stroll through the Retiro’s rose gardens, unveiling hidden sculptures before the city awakens. In the Prado’s hushed halls, our Best Tour Operator status grants you behind-the-scenes insights into Velázquez’s masterpieces. For verified details and ticketing, travelers are encouraged to visit the official Prado Museum website and Spain’s tourism board for up-to-date information.
Travelers looking for other rich cultural journeys may also explore our India to Europe Tour package or consider historic routes with an India to Italy Tour package.

Stunning Beaches, Mountains, and Cities
Barcelona unfolds like a mosaic of Gaudí’s dreams—whimsical chimneys, kaleidoscopic tiling, and soaring spires kissed by Mediterranean breezes. With the Best Package of Spain, Travelxploria secures a twilight visit to Park Güell, when lampposts flicker on and the city glitters below. Lantern-lit tapas bars await, where patatas bravas sparkle with smoky paprika and local vermouth flows freely. To fully enjoy Barcelona’s public transport and cultural events, visitors should consider local metro passes and check festival schedules on the city’s official tourism portal.
Those interested in further beach and city escapes may check out our India to Thailand Tour Package or the India to Maldives Tour package.

Perfect for Culture Lovers, Food Enthusiasts, and Families
Further south, Seville’s orange-tree courtyards echo with castanet clicks and flamenco guitar. Under our Best Family package, families explore the Alcázar’s lush courtyards by horse-drawn carriage, while little ones chase fountains beneath Moorish arches. For couples, the Best Honeymoon Planner arranges a private tablao performance—flames dancing in the singer’s eyes as heels stamp the tiled stage. Travelers are advised to book such exclusive experiences well in advance to ensure availability, especially during peak seasons.
For travelers interested in solo experiences or adventure, explore our solo travel packages or adventure tour packages for more ideas.

Top Spain Tour Packages from India

7 to 10 Days Spain Tour Package from India – Madrid, Barcelona & Andalusia
Granada’s Alhambra rises above the city like a fairy-tale fortress. Travelxploria’s Best International Tour Operator connections grant you exclusive access to the Nasrid Palaces at dawn—when sunbeams slice through ornate latticework and gardens resonate with birdsong. Visitors should note that tickets for the Alhambra sell out quickly; early booking is highly recommended through official channels.
Combine your Spain tour with an India to France Tour package or explore the breathtaking views in our India to Switzerland Tour package for an extended European adventure.

Spain Honeymoon Packages from India
On Valencia’s sun-drenched shores, paella pans sizzle with saffron-kissed rice and seafood treasures. As part of our Best Package of Spain, you’ll learn the art of rice-stirring in a family-run finca, then dine al fresco beneath palms swaying in the coastal breeze. Including such authentic culinary experiences enhances the honeymoon journey with genuine local flavor.
Couples can also explore our popular honeymoon packages for destinations like Japan or Vietnam.

Budget-Friendly Spain Tour Packages for Indian Travelers
In the Basque Country, Bilbao’s Guggenheim gleams like a ship of titanium petals. Travelxploria arranges private curator-led tours, followed by pintxos hopping through hidden bars—each morsel a burst of anchovy, olive, or Idiazábal cheese. For travelers seeking affordable Spain cultural tour packages from India on a budget, Bilbao offers a wealth of free or low-cost museums and public spaces to explore.
Expand your budget travel options with our India to Vietnam Tour Package or discover the natural wonders on our iceland tour packages from india.

Customized Spain Itineraries for Families and Groups
Island idylls await in Mallorca, where hidden coves sparkle turquoise and rose-strewn fincas overlook rolling olive groves. With our Best Family package, little ones snorkel beside playful octopuses, while parents toast the sunset with local Mallorcan wines, handpicked by our Best Honeymoon Planner. Families and groups can tailor their itineraries to include a balance of relaxation and adventure, supported by Travelxploria’s expert concierge services.

Must-Visit Destinations Covered in Spain Tour Packages

Madrid – Royal Palaces, Museums & Nightlife
Madrid is a vibrant city with rich history and nightlife. Travelers should be mindful of local customs and peak hours for tourist sites, planning visits early or late to avoid crowds.

Barcelona – Gaudí’s Masterpieces and Beaches
Barcelona’s unique architecture and beaches offer endless exploration. Visitors are encouraged to book guided tours through official sources to get the most authentic experience.

Seville – Flamenco, Historic Squares & Cathedrals
Seville is famous for its flamenco and historic ambiance. Booking shows and tours in advance through trusted providers ensures availability.

Granada – The Alhambra and Moorish Architecture
Granada’s Alhambra is a UNESCO World Heritage site. Planning and early ticket purchases are essential due to high demand.

Valencia – Festivals, Beaches, and Paella
Valencia is a hub for festivals like Las Fallas. Checking official festival dates can help travelers enjoy local celebrations fully.

What’s Included in the Best Spain Tour Packages from India?

Round-Trip Flights and Airport Transfers
Flights booked through trusted airlines ensure reliability. Airport transfers are included for a seamless travel experience.

Comfortable Accommodation with Daily Breakfast
Accommodations are carefully selected based on guest reviews and ratings to guarantee comfort and service.

Local Transportation and Guided Sightseeing Tours
Local transport options include private transfers, metros, and buses; guided tours offer in-depth cultural insights.

Optional Excursions and Cultural Experiences
Travelers can opt for additional excursions like flamenco nights, vineyard tours, or cooking classes for a richer experience.

Best Time to Visit Spain from India
Spring (March to May) – Festivals and Pleasant Weather
Spring is ideal with mild weather and vibrant festivals. Packing layers is advisable for variable temperatures.

Summer (June to August) – Beaches and Outdoor Events
Summer brings lively beach scenes but can be hot; sun protection and hydration are essential.

Autumn (September to November) – Mild Weather and Harvest Festivals
Autumn offers pleasant weather and food festivals celebrating the harvest. Booking early for popular events is recommended.

Frequently Asked Questions About Spain Tour Packages from India

What are the visa requirements for Indian travelers to Spain?
Indian travelers need a Schengen visa; applying well ahead of travel and submitting all required documents minimizes delays.

How long should a Spain tour last?
A 7 to 10-day tour allows for major highlights; customized itineraries can extend or shorten visits based on preference.

Can Spain tours be combined with other European countries?
Yes, combining Spain with nearby countries like France or Portugal is popular. Multi-country packages can be arranged through Travelxploria.

How to Book the Best Spain Tour Packages from India

Trusted Travel Agencies and Online Booking Platforms
Booking through verified agencies like Travelxploria ensures secure transactions and quality service.

Tips to Find the Best Deals and Offers
Early booking, flexible travel dates, and package deals often yield better prices. Signing up for newsletters can alert travelers to discounts.

Important Travel Documents and Packing Tips
Travelers should carry valid passports, visas, and health insurance. Packing comfortable shoes, weather-appropriate clothing, and adaptors is recommended.
